name: Solon State Bank
description_short: Solon State Bank is a traditional community bank offering personal and commercial checking, savings, and mortgage lending services with 24/7 online and mobile banking access.
description_long: Solon State Bank is a community-based financial institution that provides comprehensive banking services to both personal and commercial customers. The bank has established itself as a local banking alternative with a focus on personalized service and accessible account management. The institution operates physical branch locations with standard banking hours and maintains a digital presence through its website and mobile platforms. Founded as a traditional state bank, Solon State Bank serves its community through brick-and-mortar banking relationships and modern digital banking infrastructure. The bank offers a diversified range of deposit and lending products. On the personal banking side, Solon State Bank provides multiple checking account options including Free Checking, Regular Checking, and Personal NOW accounts, along with savings products such as Hi-Fi Savings, Regular Savings, and Christmas Club Savings. Commercial customers can access Small Business Checking, Non-Personal NOW accounts, and Non-Personal savings products. The bank also provides mortgage lending services for home purchases, loan services across both personal and commercial segments, and Certificate of Deposit (CD) products. All deposit accounts include complimentary access to online and mobile banking platforms. Solon State Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on accessible customer service and account flexibility. The bank offers account comparison tools to help customers select the right products for their financial situations. Trust services are available for customers with estate planning and wealth management needs. The institution provides dedicated mortgage lending with experienced loan officers to guide customers through the home purchase process. Mobile banking is presented as a key feature, allowing customers to manage accounts from any device with internet access, 24/7. The bank also maintains transparent communication about service features, such as lost or stolen card reporting through direct customer contact. As a traditional community bank, Solon State Bank serves customers who prefer personalized banking relationships and local branch access. However, the available website content does not provide detailed information about specific interest rates, fee structures, minimum deposit requirements, loan terms, or competitive advantages in terms of APY or APR offerings. The bank's website emphasizes functionality and product availability but lacks specific pricing information and detailed product comparison data that would help customers understand how their offerings compare to larger national banks or online-only financial institutions. For consumers seeking comprehensive product information before opening an account, additional direct contact with the bank may be necessary.
pros: Free online and mobile banking access available on all deposit accounts with 24/7 availability
Multiple checking account options (Free Checking, Regular Checking, Personal NOW) to fit different customer needs
Diverse savings products including Hi-Fi Savings, Regular Savings, and Christmas Club accounts
Experienced mortgage loan officers available to guide customers through home purchase process
Account comparison tools provided to help customers select appropriate products
Trust services available for estate planning and wealth management needs
Both personal and commercial banking services under one institution for business owners
cons: Website does not display interest rates, APY, or APR information for any products
No fee schedule or minimum deposit requirements disclosed on publicly available pages
Limited information about loan products, terms, and lending criteria
Physical branch-dependent model may not appeal to customers preferring fully digital banking
No information about CD rates despite promotional mention of 'newest CD rates' on homepage
best_for: Local community members seeking personalized banking relationships with in-person branch access
Small business owners needing integrated personal and commercial banking services
Homebuyers working with experienced mortgage lenders in their local market
Customers who prefer traditional bank products with modern digital banking capabilities
diagnosis: Solon State Bank is best for community-oriented customers and small business owners who value local branch relationships and personalized service alongside modern digital banking. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent pricing information (rates, fees, minimums) on the website, requiring customers to contact the bank directly to make informed product comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
